/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Org Chart — top-down tree, horizontal branches Reference: https://codepen.io/philippkuehn/pen/QbrOaN ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ .org-tree-container { overflow: auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } /* The root ul and all child ul share these rules */ .org-tree { display: inline-flex; /* shrink-wrap width */ flex-direction: column; align-items: center; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } /* Children row — horizontal */ .org-tree ul { display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; padding-top: 20px; /* space for vertical drop from parent */ position: relative; } /* Horizontal bar connecting siblings */ .org-tree ul::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); /* width will be set below via first/last child */ } .org-tree li { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 0 16px; position: relative; } /* Vertical drop from horizontal bar down to each node */ .org-tree li::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 2px; height: 20px; background: #a89fe0; } /* Horizontal bar — spans from first child midpoint to last child midpoint */ .org-tree li:not(:first-child):not(:last-child)::after, .org-tree li:first-child:not(:last-child)::after, .org-tree li:last-child:not(:first-child)::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; height: 2px; background: #a89fe0; } /* Left half of bar (on non-first children) */ .org-tree li:not(:first-child)::after { right: 50%; left: 0; } /* Right half of bar (on non-last children) */ .org-tree li:not(:last-child)::after { left: 50%; right: 0; } /* Only child: no bar, just vertical */ .org-tree li:first-child:last-child::before { /* keep vertical line only */ } .org-tree li:first-child:last-child::after { display: none; } /* ── Vertical line DOWN from each node to its children ul ── */ .org-tree li > .org-node-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .org-tree li > .org-node-wrap::after { content: ''; width: 2px; height: 20px; background: #a89fe0; } /* Hide the bottom line if no children */ .org-tree li:not(:has(ul)) > .org-node-wrap::after { display: none; } /* ── Node box ── */ .org-node { display: inline-block; border: 1.5px solid #6c5ce7; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; background: #fff; font-size: 0.78rem; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 80px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(108,92,231,.15); } .org-node-active { background: #ede9fc; font-weight: 700; color: #4a3aaa; }
